decomposition.decomposition_summary: Two parallel sweeps under one r1.5 sub-DAG: (A) 21 skill-template parity nodes (one per live skill currently lacking a template) + 1 sweep-validator; (B) 12 viewer-extract+rebuild nodes (scaffold · core-readers port · realtimeBridge rewrite off fleet hard-codes · DagViewer port · NICER features: force layout · node side panel · cross-lane rollup · trail timeline · search/filter · themes+export · CLI subcommand registration · self-host smoke test · per-page convergence) + 1 round-terminal validator. Total = 1 init + 21 skill + 1 skill-validator + 12 viewer + 1 r1.5-validator = 36 nodes.

griffin_directed_scope.frame: skill parity (mostly done; finite residual sweep) + dashboard EXTRACTION from fleet/dashboard/ to .dev/roadmap/viewer/ + roadmap-FIRST rebuild strictly nicer than fleet's
nicer_features: per-node side panel: desc + validator checklist + receipt JSON tree + git log + live status badge
cross-lane rollup with per-repo health + 7-day throughput sparkline
scrollable virtualized trail timeline with filter chips
PNG/SVG export of DAG state for paper figures
griffin_directed_scope.migration_off_fleet: realtimeBridge rewritten · HOST_REPO env · multi-lane fleet.json registry support · ZERO /home/griffin/src/fleet/ strings in viewer/src (validator-enforced)

auto_fix_intent: Plan-children-executor doctrine: this receipt indexes the successor spec; implementation happens in r1.5 nodes.
